title: Another Chests
description: This mod adds new stone,iron,gold and diamond chests.This chests has too much slots.
body:
Extended Storage Chests adds brand new chest tiers to Minecraft, giving players more progression and larger storage options.

📦 New Chest Types

🪨 Stone Chest

🔩 Iron Chest

🟡 Gold Chest

💎 Diamond Chest

Each tier increases storage capacity and durability, providing a smooth upgrade path from early game to late game.

⚙️ Features

Increased slot capacity for each chest tier

Balanced crafting recipes

Fully survival-friendly

Works in singleplayer and multiplayer

Optimized for performance

📈 Storage Progression

Stone Chest – Slightly larger than a normal chest

Iron Chest – Mid-tier storage upgrade

Gold Chest – Large storage space

Diamond Chest – Massive late-game storage

🔧 Compatibility

Supports Forge / NeoForge (depending on version)

Compatible with most inventory and tech mods

No performance impact
